name: Walang Matigas na Pulis sa Matinik na Misis
original_name: Walang Matigas na Pulis sa Matinik na Misis
overview: Walang Matigas na Pulis sa Matinik na Misis (transl. There's No Tough Police to a Strong Wife) is a 2023 Philippine television action comedy series broadcast by GMA Network. The series is based on the 1994 film of the same title. Directed by Enzo Williams and Frasco Mortiz, it stars Bong Revilla, Beauty Gonzalez and Max Collins.

trailers.title: 'Walang Matigas na Pulis sa Matinik na Misis' premieres this June 4! (Trailer)
